/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/webcam_filter_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/webcam_filter_tests.dir/test_convolution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcam_filter_tests.dir/test_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcam_filter_tests.dir/__/__/src/utils/filter_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcam_filter_tests.dir/__/__/src/kernels/convolution_kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/webcam_filter_tests.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o webcam_filter_tests   -L/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/15.2.1  ../../lib/libgtest.a ../../lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.13.0 ../../lib/libgtest.a /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0 -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
